damageAttribution.value: CODE_REFERENCE uses literal keys referenced by the ability class; NAME_PREFIX is the legacy naming fallback; CODE_SOURCE identifies helper/listener-owned damage with sourceClasses; UNMATCHED means neither a template nor Java source references the key.

assumptions.value: Costs and max spirituality assume full acting ratio, uniqueness 1.0, no penalties/buffs. Damage values are Sequence-9 baselines from damage-config.yml; multiply by sequenceTables.damageMultiplier.

damageProfiles.value: Keys with a profile declare their real application mechanics (on-hit throttle, DoT tick + proc chance, duration); expectedDamagePerTrigger/sustainedDps/expectedTotalPerApplication are derived from it. Keys without a profile are assumed once per cast — compare with care.

notes.value: Weapon proficiency bonus damage. Triggers on-hit when holding and swinging swords/tridents, or when explosive projectiles hit.
Expanding toxic smoke cloud; damages/poison/blind/nauseates everyone inside every 0.5 seconds for 4.0 seconds.
Applied to target on hit; ticks every 1.0s up to 4 times (first tick at 1.0s) over a 5.0s duration.
Lethal Poison Stream sub-effect; ticking poison stream field. Damages everyone inside every tick (0.05s) for up to 2.0s (or 4.0s when demonized).
Sulfur Fireball sub-effect; launches 3 (or 10-15 when demonized) explosive fireballs dealing splash damage in a 3m radius on impact.
Flame Prison sub-effect; boundary wall contact hazard. Damages and pushes back any entity touching the boundary walls. Checked every 0.1s for up to 5.0s (or 8.0s when demonized).
Sword of Lava sub-effect; swinging lava sword sweep damaging nearby entities as it travels over 15 ticks (0.75s).
Volcanic Eruption sub-effect; ticking volcanic field damaging anyone inside every 0.1s for up to 1.5s (or 2.5s when demonized).
Corruption sub-effect; ticking corruption stream field. Damages everyone inside every tick (0.05s) for up to 3.0s (or 5.0s when demonized).
Passive aura; damages nearby players within 8 blocks every 6.0 seconds and applies various debuffs.
Sovereign Filth passive. Scans 10m radius every 3.0s (60 ticks), accumulating filth stacks on nearby players. Burst damage occurs at 10 stacks (takes 15-30s).
Dealt every 2.5s while corrosion persists, up to 6 times before barrier breaks.
Barrier break damage dealt at 7 stacks (at 17.5s) to end the corrosion cycle.
Sneak + right-click throws a non-weapon, non-enchanted item. The item is consumed on hit.
Fist damage while active. Internal cooldown is 15s (below threshold 75), 10s (above 75), or 5s (above 90).
Procs on bare-hand melee attacks only (empty main hand); also applies Poison I 4s and Wither I 2s.
Dark Limbs tendril strike; each shadowy limb slams an entity it overlaps, dealing damage once per limb-tick interaction per target.
Soul Shriek; a sonic wave of dark energy that damages all entities within a cone/radius around the caster — used for both the initial AoE pulse and a focused detonation on a marked target.
Spirit Control expiry/termination strike; dealt to the host entity when possession is forcibly ended (either by caster release or host immune resistance); fires once per possession session.
Combo burst damage dealt when the target is concurrently bound by 4 or more active hands.
Damage dealt periodically by each active hand binding the target; ticks every 6.0s for up to 20.0s.
Corrosive domain aura; damages enemies inside the 12m domain every 3.0s for 20.0s.
Continuous horror aura. Damages players of sequence 5 in a 15m radius every 1.0s, building fear.
Sword of Darkness dark wave; right-click releases a sweeping wave of darkness that hits entities in its path.
Sword of Darkness melee strike; each hit with the summoned sword while the ability is active.
Right-click launches a frost scythe projectile, dealing splash damage on hit.
Melee strike damage with summoned Frost Scythe.
Ticking damage dealt to captured/pulled entities every 10 ticks (0.5s) for up to 10 ticks total (5.0s).
Periodic corrosion aura centered on cast location (14m radius). Damages non-allied entities inside every 3.0 seconds for 20.0 seconds.
Active domain of radius 30m; ticks every 1.0s on all players inside (except caster). Drains 50 spirituality/sec from caster.
Ticking damage dealt to captured players inside the Pale World arena every 1.0 second.

Infection ticks every second after a 10s incubation and persists until a 2-7%/s recovery roll succeeds (worse odds the closer the caster is) or the victim is cured. Critical stage: exposure 80-160 ticks. Also dealt once per cast to non-player targets and by NPC casts.

Infection ticks every second after a 10s incubation and persists until a 2-7%/s recovery roll succeeds (worse odds the closer the caster is) or the victim is cured. Fatal-stage spike, rolled alongside disease-fatal-minor.

Infection ticks every second after a 10s incubation and persists until a 2-7%/s recovery roll succeeds (worse odds the closer the caster is) or the victim is cured. Mild stage: exposure under 80 ticks.

Infection ticks every second after a 10s incubation and persists until a 2-7%/s recovery roll succeeds (worse odds the closer the caster is) or the victim is cured. Fatal stage: exposure over 160 ticks.
DAMAGE_OVER_TIME plague effect option; ticks every 5.0s for 60.0s once plague is triggered on target.
Deprivation bleed effect; ticks every 1.0s for 6.0s.
Periodic aura damage within 30m; ticks every 3.0s, but only active after the target accumulates >= 25% entropy (requires 75s of exposure inside the field).
BAD_LUCK phase: periodic damage ticks dealt to nearby entities within 8m while the negative luck phase is active; fires on each luck tick interval.
Fate wheel resolution; selected victims (and optionally the caster) are struck once per Cycle resolution. Used by HEALTH and FATE_BOND effect types.
Triggered damage when a bonded target uses an ATTACK/CONTROL/SUMMON/DEBUFF/OTHER ability type sealed in the Fate Bond; each seal trigger deals damage once.
Melee attack on the sleeping target's astral armor-stand projection inside the dream world; exits the dream world after connecting.
Melee strike damage with summoned Spear of Dawn.
Melee strike damage with summoned Mace of Dawn.
Melee strike damage with summoned Mace of Dawn against Unholy target.
Melee strike damage with summoned Spear of Dawn against Unholy target.
Melee strike damage with summoned Axe of Dawn against Unholy target.
Melee strike damage with summoned Sword of Dawn against Unholy target.
Melee strike damage with summoned Axe of Dawn.
Melee strike damage with summoned Sword of Dawn.
Proc on melee hit with offhand freezing-coated weapon (10% chance).
Proc on melee hit with mainhand decay-coated weapon (10% chance).
Proc on melee hit with offhand burning-coated weapon (10% chance).
Proc on melee hit with mainhand lightning-coated weapon (10% chance).
Proc on melee hit with mainhand purification-coated weapon (50% chance, 5 uses). Double damage to Unholy.
Proc on melee hit with offhand lightning-coated weapon (10% chance).
Proc on melee hit with mainhand freezing-coated weapon (10% chance).
Proc on melee hit with offhand purification-coated weapon (50% chance, 5 uses). Double damage to Unholy.
Proc on melee hit with offhand decay-coated weapon (10% chance).
Proc on melee hit with mainhand burning-coated weapon (10% chance).
Latched suffocation tick; damages target player every 1.0s while caster is latched to them (broken if target moves > 2.5m away).
Sequence 3 passive follow-up; melee attacks with sword/axe trigger a delayed (7 ticks) celestial sword strike from above on target.
Broadsword Imitation category; spawns a 20m spinning blade line. Hits targets in its path every full rotation (every 2.0s) for 20.0s.
Melee strike damage with summoned Twilight Great Sword.
Right-click launches a fan-shaped Twilight Wave, damaging and slowing entities in its path.
Impact damage when the bound target is thrown and abruptly decelerates (velocity drop detected); deals damage once per throw.
Flesh Blood Servant basic melee attack; deals damage on target hit.
Explosion burst dealt in 3m radius when servant dies or is manually detonated by left-click; hits each target once per servant.
Fully-charged flesh bomb (held 2s); larger AoE explosion in 4m radius.
Left-click flesh bonus; consumes 5 flesh reserve to strike the target entity in melee range.
Standard flesh bomb thrown/planted; AoE explosion on impact in 4m radius.
Melee strike with summoned Cull of Spiritual Flesh sword; accumulates corruption on target per hit.
Expels accumulated depravation as a Creeper-like NPC that detonates in a 10m explosion when close enough to a player; damage scales with stored depravation.
Scene Depiction category; deals periodic gaze damage every 1.0s to targets looking at the panel within 20m.
Scene Depiction category; deals a one-off explosion burst to nearby entities when the panel collapses after 9.0s.
Star-pillar category; deals a one-off detonation damage burst with knock-up at the end of the pillar strike (at 5.25s).
Star-pillar category; fires 3 (4 if enhanced by horn) starfall waves dealing damage at the epicenter over 5.25s.
Self-damage tick taken by the caster every 1.0s while Phase 3 Overreach mode is active (max 3.0s).
Aura damage dealt every 0.5s to disorderly entities within 14m of the caster while Phase 3 Overreach is active.
Procs on nearby enemies in a 7m radius whenever the caster uses any ability while Order Proxy is active.
Procs on bare-hand melee attacks only (empty main hand); also applies Poison II 5s and Wither 3s on top of the configured damage.
Toggled bat swarm flight mode; transforms caster into a bat swarm, damaging nearby targets within 2.5m every 1.0s.
Continuous gaze of darkness beam (10 ticks/sec). Damages, blinds, and weakens targets hit by the ray within 20m.
Insect Attack category; launches 6 insect swarm projectiles, each dealing damage once on contact.
Plant Binding category; binds and slowness target, ticking every 1.0s for 5.0s.
Continuous flame stream (5 pulses/sec) toggled on/off. Damages and ignites targets in a 6m cone in front of the caster. Consumes 1 coal/charcoal per pulse.
Ticking vine bind DoT; damages targets every 2.0s for up to 10.0s while they are bound.
Fires up to 5 homing fireballs at nearby targets (each deals the damage once on impact).
Augmented sword strike; procs when player swings the augmented sword and hits a target.
Blazing Field painting tick (sequence <= 6 version); ticks every 0.5s damaging and weakening enemies.
Blazing Field painting tick; ticks every 0.5s damaging and weakening enemies.
Fiery Light Beam; calls a column of light from the sky that damages and ignites entities in a 10m radius as it descends.
Pure White Ray charged shot — fired while HolyOath is active after a 30-tick charge; single-target righteous beam dealing amplified holy damage.
Purification Cleave; releases a forward-sweeping wave of holy energy that hits each entity once as the projectile travels through them.
Purification corona aura; deals periodic holy damage to enemies in a 5m radius while the light dome is active.
Overheat explosion; triggered after the dome overheats (3s), dealing a large burst of holy damage to all enemies within 10m.
Toggled/left-clicked detonation; explodes the active sun, dealing damage in a 20m expanding ring.
Floating Sun; damages and ignites undead and smite-sensitive targets in a 10m radius every 1.0s.
Floating Sun; damages and ignites other non-caster targets in a 10m radius every 1.0s.
Melee attack with the Holy Mace.
Right-click shoots a Holy Light Bolt projectile, dealing splash damage on hit in a 3m area.
Right-click launches a Holy Spear line projectile, piercing entities in its path.
Right-click sweep attack with the Holy Sword; deals damage in a 4m area and blinds/glows targets.
Right-click throws a Holy Axe projectile, dealing splash damage on hit in a 2m area.
Primary hit on non-smite-sensitive entity at ≥50% charge; amplified holy damage.
Primary hit on undead entity at ≥50% charge; boosted smite damage.
Primary hit on non-smite-sensitive entity at <50% charge.
Primary hit on smite-sensitive (undead) entity at <50% charge.
Judgement of Justice; pulls nearby evil-aligned entities (dark pathways) within 10m toward the caster and deals a single hit of justice damage to each.
Justice Trial execution strike; marks a target and delivers a righteous verdict strike after the trial period elapses without interruption.
Solar Envoy nova release; explodes in a 15m burst when the solar form expires or is manually detonated.
Solar Envoy pulsing corona; periodic aura tick within 8m while maintaining solar form.
Passive Holy Kingdom aura. Checks every 2.0s to damage undead entities and Darkness beyonders in a 50m radius.
Pure White Light nuclear strike; after a 3s wind-up the caster releases a blinding white burst that damages all entities within a 40m radius and excavates terrain within 15m.
Jacob's Ladder sub-effect; damages and launches targets in a 12m radius upward every 0.5s for 5.0s.
Astral Rain sub-effect; periodic rain of stars over 20s. Each star impacts and deals splash damage in a 2m radius.
Moisture Drain category; drains moisture, ticking every 0.6s for 3 (5 if empowered) pulses.
Whirlpool category; pulls targets to the center and deals damage every 1.0s for 3.5s (5.0s if empowered).
Continuous lightning storm. Periodically strikes lightning (every 1.0s or 0.8s on home turf) at random spots near targets, dealing damage in a 4-5m splash radius.
Periodic lightning strikes targets inside the 25m boundary field every 3.0s for 30.0s.
Toggled Storm Hell zone. Periodically strikes lightning (every 3.0s or 2.0s if water enhanced) at random spots, dealing splash damage in a 3m radius.
Mind Dragon Breath DoT effect; ticks every 1.0s for 3.0s total.
Procs on nearby enemies in a 7m radius whenever the caster uses any ability while Order Proxy is active.
Aura damage dealt every 0.5s to disorderly entities within 14m of the caster while Phase 3 Overreach is active.
Self-damage tick taken by the caster every 1.0s while Phase 3 Overreach mode is active (max 3.0s).
Ticking damage dealt to captured/pulled entities every 10 ticks (0.5s) for up to 10 ticks total (5.0s).
Melee strike damage with summoned Frost Scythe.

elements.value: # Includes all new abilities from 1.1.6 and keeps updated values for existing spells.
balancing-surge: 12.0                    # Disorder surge when Order side collapses
sword-of-judgment: 14.0                  # Base; scaled x1.4–3.0 by disorder level in event handler
sword-of-judgment-chain: 7.0            # Chain hit to nearby disorderly entities
sense-of-order-rebuke: 16.0              # Seq 1 passive punishment against nearby ability offenders
order-proxy-burst: 12.0              # Throttled AOE burst per ability use while OrderProxy is active
order-proxy-crush: 14.0               # Overreach authority crush against disorderly entities
order-proxy-overreach-self: 10.0       # Controlled self-strain during optional Overreach
justice-trial: 5.0                 # Seq 3 single-target, 3.5x halo, long cooldown
holy-kingdom: 6.0                  # Seq 1 passive tick damage vs Darkness beyonders & undead
pure-white-light: 35.0             # Seq 1 detonation AoE vs all entities in 40-block radius
mind-dragon-breath: 4.0            # Initial burst hit of enhanced Frenzy
mind-dragon-breath-dot: 2.0        # Overtime damage tick of enhanced Frenzy
fire-thrower: 10.0                 # Artificial Life Body hand modifier — flame stream, per pulse
soul-rifle: 17.582                 # Artificial Life Body hand modifier — quick soul-fuelled shot
mercury-serpent: 12.0              # Damage channeled through astral projection
fate-bond: 10.0                    # Damage detonated when sealed item is broken or picked up
cycle-of-fate: 8.0                 # Shared health hit (caster first, then all victims)
misc: ConsumptionBurstTracker; ability hits on non-Beyonder players skip MagicDamageEvent
